name: bootstrap-sass RubyGem Backdoor
description: bootstrap-sass gem compromised with remote code execution backdoor. Malicious code hidden in a cookie-based RCE mechanism allowing arbitrary command execution on Rails servers.

affected_packages.name: bootstrap-sass
affected_packages.note: Maintainer account compromised. Backdoor allows RCE via HTTP cookie.

remediation: Audit Rails application logs for suspicious cookie-based requests
Check for unauthorized command execution on servers
